campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss and vote on changes to business license tax rates in the city. Shannon Dragman from the finance department presented the annual update to these rates, which are being revised through a city code amendment. The council debated the proposal and made a decision on whether to approve the new rates.
keyTopics: Business license tax rates being increased or adjusted
Annual update to Campbell Municipal Code
Finance department presentation on tax impact
City council vote on new rate approval

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026, where residents could comment on a proposed new rule or policy. After hearing public input, the council moved forward by introducing an ordinance (a new city law) and decided to skip the usual first reading process to speed things up. The ordinance is now scheduled to be officially adopted at the council's next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held for community input
New ordinance introduced to city council
First reading of ordinance waived to expedite approval
Final adoption scheduled for next regular council meeting

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and review the city's finances from February. The council also approved several construction and professional service contracts to move forward with town improvement projects.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes from April 7
Reviewed February 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contracts with multiple vendors
Approved three-year professional services agreement
Directed preparation of town improvements

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming council sessions scheduled for May 5th and May 12th, 2026. They reviewed what items would be added to the agendas, scheduled specific times for certain discussions, and checked whether any agenda items needed special notice requirements. The council also reviewed public records from mid-to-late April.
keyTopics: Finalized agenda items for May 5, 2026 council meeting
Draft agenda planning for May 12, 2026 meeting
Scheduling specific times for agenda items to keep meetings organized
Public records review from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 28, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting where they reviewed plans to improve the city's trees and natural areas, and celebrated the Rengstorff Park Aquatics Center winning a state award for excellence. The council also recognized April as Fair Housing Month to promote equal housing opportunities for all residents.
keyTopics: Biodiversity and Urban Forest Plan - draft review for expanding trees and green space
Rengstorff Park Aquatics Center received California Parks and Recreation Society Award
Fair Housing Month Proclamation to promote equal housing access

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 28, 2026 to interview candidates for open positions on city boards and commissions. Residents had opportunities to speak during public comment, either in person at City Hall or online.
keyTopics: Board and commission candidate interviews
Public comment from residents (in-person and online options)
Special study session format

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 27, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a meeting on April 27, 2026 where they approved minutes from a previous audit meeting and reviewed how well the city's employee retirement and healthcare trust funds performed during the first three months of 2026. Residents were given a chance to speak about any city matters for up to three minutes each.
keyTopics: Approved January 26, 2026 Audit Committee meeting minutes
Reviewed retirement and healthcare fund performance (Q1 2026)
Public comment period for residents on any city business
Employee pension and benefits fund management

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs on buildings around Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup games. The council also approved a new contract agreement with the firefighters union covering 2026-2029, though one item was withdrawn before a vote.
keyTopics: Approval of temporary large-format signs near Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026
New three-year labor contract with Santa Clara Firefighters (Local 1171)
One agenda item withdrawn by staff before discussion

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026 where they discussed approving the city's next budget for 2026-27 and reviewed various fees that residents and businesses pay to the city. The council also heard about Santa Clara County's plans to address homelessness in the area.
keyTopics: Approval of the 2026-27 city budget and spending plan
Updates to user fees and charges for city services
Reissuance of tax rules and fiscal responsibility policies
County homelessness prevention and support efforts
Review of upcoming city council meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 28, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss several community projects and programs. Key items included updates on improvements to the Foothills Nature Preserve, decisions about how to manage and run the middle school athletics program going forward, and approval of the Parks and Recreation Department's work plan for next year.
keyTopics: Foothills Nature Preserve Improvements Project (PE-21000)
Middle School Athletics Program management and direction
Parks and Recreation Commission work plan for 2027
Department and liaison committee updates
